hero.title: Deploy AI Teams That Think, Learn & Act
hero.lead: ServiceTsunami is the enterprise platform for autonomous AI operations. Orchestrate agent teams that write code, monitor competitors, manage ad campaigns, triage your inbox, and automate business workflows — all with persistent memory.
hero.subtext: Stop building one-off chatbots. Deploy agent teams that code autonomously, track market signals, and execute real workflows across your business.
hero.subHighlight: The agentic AI platform that scales with your ambition.

governedDataProducts.title: Multi-Agent Team Orchestration
governedDataProducts.description: Hierarchical agent teams with supervisors, specialists, and leaf agents. Each team handles a domain — personal assistant, autonomous coding, data science, marketing, sales — coordinated by a root supervisor.

unifiedLakehouseFabric.title: Persistent Memory & Knowledge Graph
unifiedLakehouseFabric.description: Your agents remember. Entity extraction, relation mapping, lead scoring, and contextual recall across every conversation. Luna learns your contacts, preferences, and business context automatically.

agenticAutomation.title: Autonomous Execution Engine
agenticAutomation.description: Temporal-powered durable workflows across 4 queues: orchestration, databricks, code, and business. From deal pipelines to competitor monitoring to autonomous coding — reliable execution with full audit trails.

items.label: Agent Teams
items.description: Personal assistant, code agent, data team, marketing & sales, deal management, veterinary cardiology — each with their own tools, memory, and domain expertise.

items.label: Integrations
items.description: 10+ OAuth-connected integrations with automatic token refresh. Your agents read emails, manage calendar events, track Jira issues, and communicate via WhatsApp natively.

items.label: Knowledge System
items.description: Automatic extraction from every conversation. Entities are categorized, related, and scored with configurable rubrics. Agent memories capture preferences and decisions for contextual recall.

features.heading: Everything Your AI Agents Need
features.subtitle: From orchestration to memory — one platform for building production-grade AI agent systems.

connectEverySource.title: Multi-Agent Orchestration
connectEverySource.description: Design hierarchical agent teams with a root supervisor routing to specialized sub-teams. Each agent has tools, instructions, and domain expertise. Powered by Google ADK.

semanticControlPlane.title: Knowledge Graph & Memory
semanticControlPlane.description: Automatic entity extraction from conversations. Entities, relations, and agent memories form a persistent knowledge graph. Lead scoring with configurable rubrics. Recall injection gives agents context on every interaction.

agentAutomationStudio.title: Workflow Automation
agentAutomationStudio.description: Temporal-powered durable workflows for complex multi-step processes. Deal pipelines, competitor monitoring, inbox triage, knowledge extraction, and scheduled tasks — all with retry logic and audit trails.

featuresGrid.heading: Everything you need for production AI agents
featuresGrid.subtitle: From orchestration to memory to integrations — built for real-world agentic systems

multiAgentTeams.title: Multi-Agent Teams
multiAgentTeams.description: Hierarchical agent orchestration with specialized teams, supervisors, and a root coordinator

persistentMemory.title: Persistent Memory
persistentMemory.description: Knowledge graph with entity extraction, relations, lead scoring, and contextual recall

aiChat.title: AI Chat with Luna
aiChat.description: Natural language interface that learns your preferences, contacts, and business context

oauthIntegrations.title: OAuth Integrations
oauthIntegrations.description: Gmail, Calendar, WhatsApp, Jira, GitHub — agents access your real tools with auto-refresh

durableWorkflows.title: Durable Workflows
durableWorkflows.description: Temporal-powered automation across 4 task queues with retry logic and audit trails

enterpriseSecurity.title: Enterprise Security
enterpriseSecurity.description: Multi-tenant isolation, encrypted credential vault, JWT auth, and Kubernetes-native deployment

autonomousCodeAgent.title: Autonomous Code Agent
autonomousCodeAgent.description: Claude Code CLI powers autonomous coding: creates branches, implements features, opens PRs with full traceability

marketingIntelligence.title: Marketing Intelligence
marketingIntelligence.description: Monitor competitors, manage ad campaigns across Meta/Google/TikTok, and track market signals automatically

proactiveInboxMonitor.title: Proactive Inbox Monitor
proactiveInboxMonitor.description: Gmail and Calendar monitoring with auto-triage, knowledge extraction from emails, and smart notifications

lakehouse.heading: Why Agent Teams Beat Single Chatbots
lakehouse.description: Single-agent systems hit a wall. Multi-agent orchestration breaks through.

unifiedGovernance.title: The Complexity Problem
unifiedGovernance.description: Real business tasks span multiple domains — coding, analysis, marketing, communication. A single agent can't do it all well. Specialized agent teams divide and conquer.

programmablePipelines.title: The Memory Problem
programmablePipelines.description: Chatbots forget everything between sessions. ServiceTsunami's knowledge graph persists entities, relations, lead scores, and preferences across every conversation and channel.

compliantCollaboration.title: The Integration Problem
compliantCollaboration.description: Agents are useless without access to your tools. OAuth integrations with Gmail, Calendar, WhatsApp, Jira, and more give your agents real-world capabilities.

secondary.heading: Platform Capabilities
secondary.description: What you get out of the box.

adaptiveGuardrails.title: Luna — Your AI Co-Pilot
adaptiveGuardrails.description: A personal assistant that learns from every interaction. Luna extracts contacts, remembers preferences, monitors your inbox, scores leads, and gets smarter over time.

explainableDecisions.title: Autonomous Code Agent
explainableDecisions.description: Claude Code CLI runs in a dedicated pod, creating branches, implementing features, running tests, and opening PRs — autonomously and with full traceability.

lakehouseSignals.title: Enterprise-Grade Security
lakehouseSignals.description: Multi-tenant isolation, Fernet-encrypted credential vault, JWT authentication, and full audit trails. Deploy on your own GKE cluster with Helm charts.

dataIntegrationLayer.title: Integration Layer
dataIntegrationLayer.description: OAuth providers (Google, GitHub, Jira), WhatsApp Business API, MCP server for Databricks, and credential vault for secure token management.

semanticGovernanceLayer.title: Orchestration Layer
semanticGovernanceLayer.description: Google ADK multi-agent supervisor pattern with hierarchical routing. Task dispatch, entity validation, and lead scoring. Reliable execution at scale.

executionLayer.title: Execution Layer
executionLayer.description: Temporal durable workflows across 4 queues: orchestration, databricks, code, and business. Inbox monitoring, competitor tracking, deal pipelines, and code tasks.

agenticExecutionLayer.title: Intelligence Layer
agenticExecutionLayer.description: Knowledge graph with entity extraction, relation mapping, and contextual recall. Multi-LLM router supporting Claude, GPT, DeepSeek, and more. Report generation in Excel/PDF.

ai.heading: Agent Teams for Every Domain
ai.description: Deploy specialized AI teams across your organization. Each team has dedicated tools, memory, and domain expertise.

insightCopilots.title: Personal Assistant (Luna)
insightCopilots.description: Email management, calendar coordination, WhatsApp communication, inbox monitoring, Jira tracking, and proactive follow-ups. Your AI executive assistant that learns from every interaction.

composableSkills.title: Data & Analytics Team
composableSkills.description: Data analyst, report generator, and knowledge manager agents. SQL queries, dataset analysis, automated Excel/PDF reports, and knowledge graph management.

closedLoopActuators.title: Code Agent
closedLoopActuators.description: Autonomous coding powered by Claude Code CLI. Creates feature branches, implements code, runs tests, and opens pull requests — all in an isolated Kubernetes pod.

marketingSales.title: Marketing & Sales Team
marketingSales.description: Ad campaign management across Meta, Google, and TikTok. Competitor monitoring on a 24h cycle. Lead scoring with configurable rubrics. Customer support and deal management.

dealTeam.title: Deal Team
dealTeam.description: Full M&A pipeline: discover, score, research, outreach, advance, and sync. Automated deal workflows with multi-step research and stakeholder management.

vetCardiology.title: Veterinary Cardiology (HealthPets)
vetCardiology.description: Cardiac analyst, billing agent, and vet supervisor for veterinary clinics. Monthly billing workflows, usage tracking, and specialized medical analysis.

marketplaceConnectors.title: SRE & Infrastructure Agents
marketplaceConnectors.description: Alert triage, pattern detection, cloud architecture design, and infrastructure troubleshooting. Slack integration for ops channel monitoring.

adaptiveGovernanceAi.title: Advanced Memory & Recall
adaptiveGovernanceAi.description: Proactive memory suggestions, cross-session context threading, and memory-driven automations. Your agents anticipate what you need.

autonomousFinopsSuites.title: Marketplace & Plugins
autonomousFinopsSuites.description: Community-built agent skills, tool integrations, and workflow templates. Extend your agent capabilities without writing code.

memory.heading: Memory That Gets Smarter Every Day
memory.description: Every conversation teaches your agents. Luna automatically extracts people, companies, preferences, and decisions into a persistent knowledge graph. Next time you ask, she already knows the context.

ctaBanner.heading: Your AI team is ready to deploy
ctaBanner.description: Create your account and start chatting with Luna in minutes. She'll learn your contacts, preferences, and workflows from day one.

testimonials.heading: Built for Builders
testimonials.subtitle: How teams are using ServiceTsunami to deploy production AI agents

items.quote: We went from a single chatbot to a full agent fleet in two weeks. Luna handles our client communications while the code agent ships features autonomously. The memory system means nothing falls through the cracks.
items.author: AI Engineering Lead

items.quote: The autonomous code agent is unlike anything I've seen. It creates branches, implements features, and opens PRs on its own. Combined with the marketing intelligence and knowledge graph, it's like having an AI team that gets smarter every day.
items.author: CTO

cta.heading: Ready to Deploy Your AI Agent Team?
cta.description: Start building multi-agent systems today. Create your account and have Luna, your AI co-pilot, up and running in minutes.
